steps.vulnerability_name: Enforce JWT algorithm allowlist in workshop-service
steps.description: Require algorithms list in jwt.decode so unsigned/none tokens are rejected.

steps.vulnerability_name: Enforce JWT algorithm allowlist in community-service
steps.description: Harden jwt.ParseUnverified to deny alg=none by checking algorithm after identity verification.

verification.description: Unsigned JWT (alg=none) must be rejected on identity endpoint
Unsigned JWT (alg=none) must be rejected on workshop endpoint
Unsigned JWT (alg=none) must be rejected on community endpoint
